title: Build a Geometry Studio in C++

milestones.title: Milestone 1: shape hierarchy with virtual area and perimeter

tests.name: single circle prints area and perimeter
single rectangle prints area and perimeter
circle then rectangle reuses the virtual interface
tests.expected_stdout:
added circle area=3.14 perimeter=6.28
added rectangle area=6.00 perimeter=10.00

tests.name: triangle interleaves with existing shapes
tests.expected_stdout:
added circle area=12.57 perimeter=12.57
added triangle area=24.00 perimeter=24.00
added rectangle area=4.00 perimeter=10.00

milestones.title: Milestone 3: store shapes polymorphically with smart pointers

tests.name: list iterates the polymorphic vector
tests.expected_stdout:
added circle area=3.14 perimeter=6.28
added rectangle area=6.00 perimeter=10.00
0 circle area=3.14 perimeter=6.28
1 rectangle area=6.00 perimeter=10.00

tests.name: summary aggregates total area
tests.expected_stdout:
added circle area=3.14 perimeter=6.28
added rectangle area=6.00 perimeter=10.00
count=2 total_area=9.14

tests.name: summary on empty collection prints count=0

milestones.title: Milestone 4: a generic Stats class template

tests.name: stats reports min/max/avg of area and perimeter
tests.expected_stdout:
added circle area=3.14 perimeter=6.28
added rectangle area=6.00 perimeter=10.00
area min=3.14 max=6.00 avg=4.57
perimeter min=6.28 max=10.00 avg=8.14

tests.name: stats on an empty collection prints no shapes
stats works across three different shape kinds
tests.expected_stdout:
added circle area=3.14 perimeter=6.28
added rectangle area=6.00 perimeter=10.00
added triangle area=6.00 perimeter=12.00
area min=3.14 max=6.00 avg=5.05
perimeter min=6.28 max=12.00 avg=9.43

milestones.title: Milestone 5: validation with exceptions and std::istringstream

tests.name: negative circle radius throws ShapeError
tests.expected_stdout: ERROR: circle radius must be positive

tests.name: rectangle with zero side is rejected
tests.expected_stdout: ERROR: rectangle sides must be positive

tests.name: loop keeps running after an error
tests.expected_stdout:
ERROR: circle radius must be positive
added circle area=3.14 perimeter=6.28
0 circle area=3.14 perimeter=6.28
